headline: Fathom Entertainment Names Jason Brenek New Chief Executive Officer
summary: DENVER, July 08, 2026--Fathom Entertainment, the leading specialty distributor of content to theatrical partners worldwide, announced the appointment of Jason Brenek as its new Chief Executive Officer. headline: Is It Worth Investing in Disney (DIS) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Disney (DIS) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?
